title: lobelia graniticola
intro: Lobelia graniticola, also known as Granite Lobelia, is a plant species within the Lobelia genus, native to the mountainous regions of New South Wales in Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the respiratory system and act as an expectorant, helping to relieve coughs and congestion. The health benefits of Lobelia graniticola include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Lobelia graniticola is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory issues and arthritis.
